---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement for Smart DMS
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow or limitation should this address?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired behavior from a user's point of view.

## Alternatives Considered

List alternatives or workarounds, if any.

## Scope Notes

- Does this affect backend APIs or shared DTOs?
- Does this affect the web UI?
- Does this affect Docker/deployment?
- Does this affect security, privacy or document processing?

## Additional Context

Add links, screenshots with synthetic data, or implementation notes.
